name: Almond Butter Christmas Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour once and mix with baking powder and salt, sifting together three times.
2. Cream butter thoroughly until light and fluffy.
3. Add sugar gradually, beating after each addition until smooth.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Mix in chopped almonds and raisins.
6. Gradually add flour alternately with milk, beating after each addition until the batter is smooth.
7. Stir in vanilla extract.
8. Pour the batter into two greased 9-inch layer pans.
9. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 25 minutes, or until done.
10. Spread boiled frosting between layers and on top and sides of cake.
11. Decorate with holly wreath using maraschino cherries or red cinnamon candies as berries, and angelica or citron slices for leaves and stems. Alternatively, decorate with poinsettias made from candied cherries by cutting cherry rings in half to form petals and arranging them on top.
Note: This recipe is from the Kate Smith Collection (1940) published by General Foods Corp.
